bullets: House church believers across China facing raids, detention, and ongoing legal pressure from authorities during worship gatherings.
A believer and his family in Bangladesh recovering from a violent assault and living in trauma and fear amid rising pressure on Christians.
Nearly 300 displaced Christians in India left homeless and vulnerable after mob violence destroyed their homes and forced them to flee.
A 13-year-old Christian girl in Pakistan allegedly abducted, forcibly converted, and feared trafficked with little response from authorities.
Nigerian Christians killed in militant attacks, with approximately 100 believers still held captive and communities living under severe insecurity.

Civilians across Nigeria — in northern states, Borno, Kebbi, Abuja, Edo, and Oyo — bearing the weight of kidnapping networks, militant attacks, banditry, and massacres that have claimed dozens of lives in recent days.
Civilians in Myanmar's Rakhine state, including children, killed and wounded in repeated military airstrikes on residential areas amid ongoing armed conflict.
Residents and children of southern Lebanon caught in continued Israeli strikes despite ceasefire announcements, with thousands of displaced families returning to uncertain and dangerous conditions.

Palestinians in Gaza and the West Bank facing ongoing strikes and displacement, with more than 1,000 killed since a declared ceasefire, and families in refugee camps returning to find their homes destroyed.
Civilians across Ukraine living under drone and missile strikes, including those near industrial and chemical storage facilities whose fires threaten air quality and public health.
Residents of Russia's Moscow region and surrounding areas affected by large-scale drone strikes, fires at fuel infrastructure, and damage to homes and public buildings.
Communities in Haiti enduring gang violence that has claimed more than 2,000 lives this year, with widespread displacement and loss of access to basic services.
Civilians in Somalia's Baidoa and Mudug regions facing suicide bombings and ongoing military operations against armed extremist groups.
Communities in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo facing the compounding dangers of armed violence and an active Ebola outbreak, including patients removed from medical care by armed men.
Residents of southern Lebanon, including children, enduring more than 100 days of conflict with an average of 12 children killed or wounded daily, according to UNICEF.
Civilians near Damascus, Syria, remaining vulnerable to sporadic ISIS attacks amid the country's fragile and shifting security situation.
Residents of Niamey, Niger, affected by an armed attack on the country's main airport amid broader national instability.
Communities across Ecuador, particularly in and around major cities, living under escalating gang violence following a state of emergency declared across ten provinces.
Residents of South Africa affected by a mass shooting that left 12 people dead, and Malawian migrants stranded in unsafe conditions while seeking repatriation.
Civilians and travelers in South Sudan facing deadly road ambushes in areas where armed violence continues to disrupt daily life.
Sailors and civilian vessels in the English Channel amid rising tensions involving sanctioned Russian tankers and a warship that fired warning shots near a civilian yacht.
Exiled dissidents and critics living in Europe facing threats to their safety, following the killing of a Russian artist in Poland in what authorities are investigating as a targeted attack.

Communities across eastern Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda facing a severe Ebola outbreak with nearly 840 confirmed cases, nearly 200 deaths, a rare strain lacking an approved vaccine, community mistrust hindering response, and active cross-border spread

Thousands of residents across multiple U.S. states facing wildfires, flooding, tornadoes, and drought emergencies, with homes destroyed, families displaced, one person missing, and communities grieving preventable deaths
Tens of thousands of evacuated residents across southern China facing dangerous flooding and displacement as emergency teams respond
Families across Ghana facing deadly flooding with thousands displaced and at least one life lost
Families in South Africa's coastal region grieving deaths and cut off from aid by flood-damaged infrastructure amid ongoing dangerous conditions
Families and communities in Niger facing deadly flooding that has already claimed at least seven lives with further threats ongoing
Residents near flooding rivers in Russia facing dangerously elevated water levels with ongoing risk to life and property
Families in the southern Philippines grieving at least 78 deaths following a devastating earthquake, with 36 people still unaccounted for and search teams finding no signs of life
Communities in the Philippines living near an active volcano now in its 163rd consecutive day of eruption, facing pyroclastic flows and ongoing danger
Communities in Indonesia affected by a volcanic eruption with heavy ashfall, and families of three workers killed in landslides at illegal mining sites
Families and healthcare workers in Canada facing a hepatitis A outbreak serious enough to trigger international travel warnings
Families and exhausted medical workers in the United States enduring a prolonged measles outbreak taking a severe emotional and physical toll
Rwandan communities and health workers navigating the complex aftermath of a Marburg virus outbreak complicated by newly identified sexual transmission routes
Researchers and wildlife conservation teams responding to the loss of more than 13,000 seal pups to H5N1 bird flu on a remote Australian territory
